content: I'm an AI Engineer and Data Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing scalable AI, machine learning, and cloud data solutions across the healthcare, insurance, and financial services domains. My work spans the full stack of modern data and AI: Python, SQL, PySpark, Databricks, Snowflake, Azure Data Factory, Azure AI, Azure OpenAI, LangChain, RAG, Kafka, Spark, FastAPI, and end-to-end ETL/ELT pipelines.

I focus on building intelligent analytics solutions, optimizing large-scale data processing systems, and standing up MLOps workflows with Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud-native platforms. Across every role I've delivered data-driven insights that improve operational efficiency, strengthen data reliability, and sharpen enterprise decision-making, from real-time pipelines processing millions of daily transactions to Generative AI copilots that cut manual review effort.
